items.title: Trump weighs travel ban on dozens of countries, memo says | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The Trump administration is considering issuing travel restrictions for citizens of dozens of countries, including Afghanistan, Iran, Syria, Cuba, and North Korea, among others, as part of a new ban.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #donaldtrump #trumptariff #unitedstates #travelban

items.title: Trump's tariffs leave US bourbon distillers in limbo | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Victor Yarbrough, who is a small bourbon producer in Kentucky had been in talks to expand sales in Canada but with the Trump administration’s tariff war, ‘the whole Canadian growth strategy is now on pause,’ he said. 

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #trumptariffs #alcohol #unitedstates #canada

items.title: Protesters flood Belgrade in huge anti-government rally | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Tens of thousands of protesters took to the streets in Serbia's capital Belgrade to protest state corruption and negligence under President Aleksandar Vucic after a railway station roof collapse killed 15 people last year.

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.title: Elbows up in Canada
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Canada's anger at Donald Trump has prompted a wave of protest, consumer backlash and a ‘Saturday Night Live’ call out from Mike Myers. It's also helped usher in political newcomer Mark Carney as the new Canadian prime minister and opened a window for Ontario's premier Doug Ford to step into the global conversation. Our editors in Ottawa and Toronto explore how this reaction to Trump is affecting everyday Canadian life and reshaping politics.






Angry Canadians get their 'elbows up' in face of Trump Threats (https://www.reuters.com/world/americas/angry-canadians-get-their-elbows-up-face-trump-threats-2025-03-15/) 






Listen to the Reuters Econ World podcast here (https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Flink.chtbl.com%2FAbxd8GDx&data=05%7C02%7CGayle.Issa%40thomsonreuters.com%7C61fba21571bc4521d54008dd62cc9fb1%7C62ccb8646a1a4b5d8e1c397dec1a8258%7C0%7C0%7C638775353175569335%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=OK3JQtm1p1ckSHrS0tg6WKa4wB4%2FW9KfiW1CgGSJj%2F0%3D&reserved=0) .

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.title: LIVE: US Senate votes on Republican spending bill
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The U.S. Senate is poised to pass a stopgap spending bill and avert a partial government shutdown, after Democrats backed down in a standoff driven by anger over President Donald Trump's campaign to slash the federal workforce.
 
#Senate #Bill #Spending #Democrats #Republicans #GOP #UnitedStates #Vote #USPolitics #Trump #DonaldTrump #Workforce #Reuters #News #Live
